name: Kim's Pacific Salmon
recipeIngredient: 4 Pacific salmon fillets (4 oz each), skin removed
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the shallots, salmon fillets, white wine, and water in a large frying pan that can hold the fillets in a single layer. Cover and bring the liquid to just a simmer.
2. Poach the salmon for about 2 minutes per side. Remove from the heat and keep warm. Reserve the stock for use in the sauce.
3. To make the sauce, place the shallots, fish stock, white wine, and lemon juice in a saucepan. Bring to a boil, then reduce the liquid by half.
4. Strain the sauce mixture. Add cubed butter to the strained sauce, whisking one piece at a time until fully incorporated. Do not allow the sauce to boil.
5. Season with dill, salt, and pepper to taste. Serve the warm salmon with asparagus.
